The coffee shop was closed after 8pm, so Andrew had to go there before that time. The options are given as (A) 3pm to 4pm, (B) 6pm to 8pm, (C) 8am to 11am, and (D) 11am to 3pm. So, I need to find out the time periods when Andrew wasn't doing any of these other activities, thus allowing him to go to the coffee shop. Let's break down the timeline: - 8am: Andrew wakes up. So not available here either. - 6pm to 8pm: At the movie theater. Still not available here. So the only time he's not accounted for is between 8am and 11am.
